== Douglas' Tooth ==
This pair of shiny teeth was restored with biological weapon technologies. They resemble Douglas' Tooth and has outstanding performances.

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Douglas' Tooth
|Rarity=red
|ID Number=79
|Initial HP=110
|HP Increase=30
|Initial ATK=15
|ATK Increase=3
|Initial DEF=15
|DEF Increase=3
|Initial RUSH=11
|RUSH Increase=3
|Effect 1=Snail FAME +###
|Initial Effect Value 1=5
|Effect Value Increase 1=5
|Effect 2=All ELMT DMG +###
|Initial Effect Value 2=1
|Effect Value Increase 2=1
|Effect 3=All ELMT RES +###
|Initial Effect Value 3=1
|Effect Value Increase 3=1
|Effect 4=Currency gained from Hamster Incidents +###%
|Initial Effect Value 4=0.1
|Effect Value Increase 4=0.1
|}}

==Source==
After using 10 {{RewardIconWithText|Hamsters Gene Essence}}s, you can recycle further ones for this organ.

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Red Organs]]
[[Category:Hamster]]
